## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Changes are focused (one concern per PR)
- [ ] No secrets, `.env` files, or `dist/` committed
- [ ] New routes added to `README.md` (if applicable)
